prestazioni: Engine swap to a **426 Hemi (RB-E493)** crate motor from **Mopar Performance**, bored to 432ci with forged **Callies Compstar 4340 crankshaft**, **Manley H-beam connecting rods**, and **JE 12.5:1 forged pistons**, paired with a **Holley Dominator 1250 CFM carburetor** on an **Edelbrock Victor Jr. intake manifold**, producing **650+ HP** with a **Comp Cams Xtreme Energy 292H camshaft** (248°/254° duration, .585/.595 lift, 110° LSA).

Forced induction via a **Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA ball-bearing turbocharger** (62mm inducer, 84mm exducer) with a **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** and **Turbonetics Race Series intercooler**, running **22 psi of boost** on a **custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo manifold** by **Stainless Works**, with a **TurboSmart Kompact 50mm blow-off valve**.

Drivetrain upgrades including a **Tremec TKO-600 5-speed manual transmission** with a **McLeod twin-disc RST 10.5-inch clutch**, **Hurst Blackjack shifter**, and a **Dana 60 rear end** with **4.10:1 gearing**, **Moser 35-spline axles**, and a **Detroit Locker differential**, all mounted on a **Chris Alston’s Chassisworks G-Machine subframe** with **polyurethane bushings**.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny Pandem Daytona-specific widebody kit** (front fenders, rear quarters, and rear bumper) with **custom carbon fiber overfenders** by **AeroCatch**, paired with a **custom 3D-printed ABS front splitter** and **ducktail spoiler** for downforce.

Custom **PPG Hot Rod Black** paint with **House of Kolor Kandy Apple Red** ghost flames, applied by **Sikkens Autoclear**, and **Billet Specialties Vintec wheels** (18x9 front, 18x12 rear) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires** (255/40/18 front, 335/30/18 rear).

Interior overhaul with **Recaro Pole Position seats** (1970s-spec, reupholstered in **Nappa leather with Alcantara inserts**), **Momo Prototipo steering wheel** on a **Ididit tilt column**, **AutoMeter Pro-Comp gauges** (boost, oil pressure, fuel pressure), and a **Rolls-Royce-style shift knob** on the **Hurst shifter**, all trimmed in **custom red-stitching**.
